assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he names a missing escalation guide, which is a strong clarity gap; no direct wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Escalate vs batch
new_queue.name: What would a useful escalate-versus-batch guide need to cover?
new_queue.description: Turns the missing escalation guide into concrete onboarding support the manager can provide.

new_queue.label: Team contact
new_queue.name: Who have you had the most useful direct contact with so far, Riley?
new_queue.description: Shows whether his onboarding is still too doc-heavy and where relationships are thin.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?
new_queue.description: Converts missing context into a concrete manager support plan.

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete follow-up and keeps the meeting moving toward action.
